nodes.label: IFN Official Event Stage Group Photo - Hero Banner
nodes.description: Large group of dignitaries and participants standing on a stage at an IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) official event. The IFN logo is prominently displayed on a large screen backdrop. A central figure is speaking at a microphone/podium. Participants wearing traditional Nepali attire and formal clothes, many with red scarves (khada). Used as the hero/banner image for the website.
